name: check-propagation
purpose: Detects propagation misses — functions modified in one file but not in all copies — via two modes: function-name diffing (Mode A) and registry-based pattern detection (Mode B).
notes: ESM (mixed) — uses createRequire(import.meta.url) to load CJS lib/load-propagation-registry. Also reads .claude/config/propagation-intentional-divergence.json (a config file outside scripts/config/). Called from .husky/pre-push. Uses SKIP_PROPAGATION env kill-switch. Shares lib with check-propagation-staged.js (both use load-propagation-registry). sanitize_fields: SEARCH_DIRS and IGNORE_DIRS are hardcoded to SoNash repo layout.

name: check-review-archive
purpose: JSONL-canonical health checker for the review lifecycle pipeline — validates reviews.jsonl integrity, duplicate IDs, temporal coverage, consolidation state, and rendered markdown view accuracy.
notes: CJS (require). Exports analyzeTemporalCoverage and getISOWeek for test consumption. Writes S0/S1 findings to .claude/state/forward-findings.jsonl. References hardcoded SoNash state paths: .claude/state/reviews.jsonl, consolidation.json, docs/AI_REVIEW_LEARNINGS_LOG.md. Not portable — the entire review lifecycle is SoNash-specific. KNOWN_DUPLICATE_IDS set = {366,367,368,369} is SoNash-specific historical data.

name: check-review-needed
purpose: Checks per-category code review trigger thresholds (code, security, performance, refactoring, documentation, process) and multi-AI escalation triggers based on commit counts, file changes, and optionally SonarCloud API metrics.
notes: ESM (mixed) — uses createRequire to load scripts/config/load-config (CJS). Depends on audit-config.json from scripts/config/. References SoNash-specific paths: docs/audits/AUDIT_TRACKER.md, MULTI_AI_REVIEW_COORDINATOR.md. Hardcodes SonarCloud project key jasonmichaelbell78-creator_sonash-v0 as fallback. Not portable due to audit config schema and SoNash-specific review workflow.

name: check-roadmap-health
purpose: Validates ROADMAP.md and ROADMAP_FUTURE.md for consistency: version numbers, duplicate progress percentages, broken links, and parallel group marker alignment with PARALLEL_EXECUTION_GUIDE.md.
notes: CJS (require). No lib imports beyond node:fs and node:path. Uses native error.code access (not sanitizeError) — non-standard for SoNash but acceptable for a manual validation script. References SoNash-specific files: ROADMAP.md, ROADMAP_FUTURE.md, analysis/PARALLEL_EXECUTION_GUIDE.md. Not portable due to roadmap structure being SoNash-specific project management.

name: check-roadmap-hygiene
purpose: Validates ROADMAP.md hygiene: flags completed items not archived to ROADMAP_LOG.md, SESSION_CONTEXT.md sync with active sprint, and scans recent commits for potentially complete open items.
notes: CJS. Does NOT use sanitizeError — catches errors silently or logs raw err (non-standard). References SoNash-specific files: ROADMAP.md, ROADMAP_LOG.md, SESSION_CONTEXT.md. Not portable — ROADMAP lifecycle is SoNash-specific project management infrastructure.

name: check-session-gaps
purpose: Session-begin gap detector (Layer D) — reads .claude/state/commit-log.jsonl and SESSION_CONTEXT.md to detect commits with no matching documented session summary.
notes: CJS. Auto-invokes seed-commit-log.js via execFileSync if commit-log.jsonl is missing. References SoNash-specific files: .claude/state/commit-log.jsonl, SESSION_CONTEXT.md. Session-context structure (Session #NNN Summary pattern) is a SoNash convention. Not portable without porting the full session-tracking infrastructure.

name: check-skill-audit-status
purpose: Lists all skills with their audit status — state file existence, SKILL.md version history audit entries, days since last audit — and flags skills needing re-audit (>30 days or never audited).
notes: CJS. Reads .claude/state/task-skill-audit-{skillName}.state.json — state file naming pattern tied to SoNash skill-audit workflow. Imports sanitize-error.cjs (with .cjs extension — different from scripts using .js extension alias). sanitize-then-portable: the core logic (skill dir scan + state file check + version history parse) is generic; only the state file naming convention needs sanitization.

name: check-slopsquat
purpose: Detects potentially hallucinated npm package names by verifying each dependency in package.json files against the npm registry (404 = possible slopsquatting risk).
notes: CJS. Exports parseArgs, extractDeps, getAllDeps, classifyVerdict, verdictTag, printFlaggedReport (library-style exports + entry point). Requires --private-ok flag to run (explicit acknowledgment of npm registry disclosure). NOT wired to pre-commit — manual invocation only. Uses fetch() (Node 18+). Hardcodes functions/package.json as second scan target — sanitize_fields is empty because the functions/ path reference is not a portability blocker (validatePathInDir handles it gracefully if the path is absent). Uses validatePathInDir from security-helpers for path containment. Prototype status per comments.

name: check-triggers
purpose: Event-based trigger checker for pre-push — detects security-sensitive file changes, skill/agent file modifications, and review markdown/JSONL sync drift.
notes: CJS. Depends on scripts/lib/validate-skip-reason.js — the known D6a gap. Invokes log-override.js via execFileSync for audit trail on SKIP_TRIGGERS=1. Called from .husky/pre-push. Three trigger types: security_audit (blocking), skill_validation (warning), review_sync (warning). sanitize-then-portable: the trigger framework is generic; specific paths and review_sync logic are SoNash-specific.

name: cleanup-alert-sessions
purpose: Deletes alert session JSONL logs older than 7 days from .claude/tmp/ — maintenance utility.
notes: CJS. Directly requires .claude/hooks/lib/symlink-guard (not a scripts/lib/ dependency — unusual cross-boundary coupling). Gracefully degrades if symlink-guard is unavailable (isSafeToWrite = () => false). The .claude/tmp/ target dir pattern is generic enough to be portable — but the symlink-guard dependency must co-port. Portable once symlink-guard is available.

name: detect-orphans
purpose: Cross-format reference graph scanner that identifies files with zero incoming references across 9 categories (scripts, workflows, hooks, state-files, agents, skills, docs, planning, research).
notes: CJS. Async main() — uses top-level await via .catch(). References lib/reference-graph.js (a heavyweight lib that builds the cross-repo reference index). Writes findings to .planning/orphan-detection/findings.jsonl. Reads .planning/todos.jsonl for todo correlation. The reference-graph lib is itself a portability dependency. sanitize-then-portable: the scanner framework is generic; the category-specific scanner functions reference SoNash-specific paths.

name: generate-claude-antipatterns
purpose: CLI wrapper for CLAUDE.md Section 4 auto-updater — delegates to compiled TypeScript module at scripts/reviews/dist/lib/generate-claude-antipatterns.js.
notes: CJS. Pure delegation wrapper — requires compiled TypeScript (cd scripts/reviews && npx tsc). The actual logic lives in scripts/reviews/ TypeScript sources. Not portable: tightly coupled to SoNash's CLAUDE.md Section 4 auto-managed region and the reviews TypeScript subsystem. The reviews/ dir is its own subsystem not yet covered in this D6b scan.

name: generate-detailed-sonar-report
purpose: Fetches SonarCloud issues via API and generates a detailed markdown report at docs/audits/sonarcloud-issues-detailed.md with code snippets from local source files.
notes: CJS. Reads sonar-project.properties for org/project defaults. Derives project key from sonar.organization + sonar.projectKey. Optionally loads dotenv from .env.local. sanitize-then-portable: the SonarCloud fetch + report pattern is generic; only the project key and output path are SoNash-specific. Full implementation extends beyond the first 80 lines read.

name: generate-fix-template-stubs
purpose: CLI wrapper that appends FIX_TEMPLATES.md template skeletons for promoted patterns — delegates to compiled TypeScript module at scripts/reviews/dist/lib/generate-fix-template-stubs.js.
notes: CJS. Pure delegation wrapper — same pattern as generate-claude-antipatterns.js. Requires compiled TypeScript. Not portable: tied to SoNash's FIX_TEMPLATES.md and reviews TypeScript subsystem.

name: generate-lifecycle-scores-md
purpose: Generates LIFECYCLE_SCORES.md dashboard from .claude/state/lifecycle-scores.jsonl — part of Data Effectiveness Audit (Wave 5.1).
notes: CJS. Manual invocation only — not wired to any hook or npm script. Invoked by data-effectiveness-audit skill. Uses read-jsonl lib. sanitize-then-portable: the JSONL-to-markdown generation pattern is generic; the specific state file and output paths are SoNash-specific. Inline sanitizeError fallback defined if security-helpers load fails.

name: lighthouse-audit
purpose: Runs Lighthouse multi-page audits against all application routes and outputs performance/accessibility/SEO/PWA reports.
notes: CJS. Depends on lighthouse and chrome-launcher npm packages. Requires running Next.js dev server (http://localhost:3000). ROUTES are SoNash-specific application pages (/today, /journal, /growth, /more, /login). sanitize-then-portable: the Lighthouse runner pattern is generic; the routes are SoNash-specific. Full implementation extends beyond first 80 lines read.
